summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ArXiv Paper Tournament platform. Fixed critical backend bug (HTTP->HTTPS for arXiv API). All core features working: tournament creation, LLM-powered pairwise comparisons, Bradley-Terry scoring, and results display.

critical_bugs.issue: arXiv API URL was using HTTP instead of HTTPS, causing 301 redirects and failures
critical_bugs.fix_applied: Changed base_url from 'http://export.arxiv.org/api/query' to 'https://export.arxiv.org/api/query' in server.py line 131

integration_issues.issue: Tournament page briefly shows 'Loading tournament...' before displaying content
integration_issues.impact: Cosmetic delay in UI rendering, does not affect functionality

passed_tests: Backend API connectivity and root endpoint
POST /api/tournaments - creates tournament with papers and matches
GET /api/tournaments/{id} - returns tournament details and progress
Tournament progress monitoring and LLM comparisons
Home page loads with category dropdown and sliders
Tournament creation flow from home page
Tournament page displays progress, papers, and match logs
Results page shows top 3 papers and complete rankings
Navigation between all pages works correctly
Paper links to arXiv work correctly
Error handling for invalid categories and non-existent tournaments
